---
title: "plateau-baseline-740 — analysis notebook"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
---

## Purpose

Companion analysis notebook for `plateau-baseline-740`. Plots and the
calibration / ROC inspection that sit alongside `metrics.json`.

## Load metrics

```{python}
#| label: load-metrics
import json, pathlib
m = json.loads(pathlib.Path("metrics.json").read_text())
m
```

## Calibration

See `results/calibration.png`. Generated by `train.py:plot_calibration`.

## ROC

See `results/roc.png`. Generated by `train.py:plot_roc`.

## Notes

- Validation split only — test is sealed per `~/.claude/rules/evaluation.md`.
